## Checklist
- [ ] I edited `core/` and/or `knowledge/` only — I did **not** hand-edit anything under `adapters/`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` to regenerate the adapters.
- [ ] I ran `node --test` and all tests pass.
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (all 9 adapters are in sync with the source).
- [ ] I updated `knowledge/_index.md` if I added a new module.
